word: G816 - ἀτενίζω - atenízō - at-en-id'-zo - Behold earnestly

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to fix the eyes on, gaze upon

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G1 (as a particle of union) and τείνω teinō (to stretch); to gaze intently: - behold earnestly (stedfastly), fasten (eyes), look (earnestly, stedfastly, up stedfastly), set eyes.
